## Summary

Describe the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] README or docs were updated for CLI or report behavior changes.
- [ ] No real credentials, tokens, cookies, logs, personal emails, production hosts, or private config values were added.
- [ ] No network access, telemetry, automatic fixes, or write-back behavior was added.
- [ ] Security, privacy, and legal wording remains conservative.
